verses.geez:
ወይቤልዎ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ኤፍሬም ፡ ምንት ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ነገር ፡ ዘገበርከ ፡ ላዕሌነ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢትጸውዐነ ፡ አመ ፡ ሖርከ ፡
                  ትትቃተሎሙ ፡ ለምድያም ፡ ወተሳነኑ ፡ ምስሌሁ ፡ ዐቢየ ፡ ተስናነ ።

translations.lxx: And the men of Ephraim said to Gedeon, What is this that thou hast done to us, in that thou didst not call us when thou wentest to fight with Madiam? and they chode with him sharply.
translations.kjv: And the men of Ephraim said unto him, Why hast thou served us thus, that thou calledst us not, when thou wentest to fight with the Midianites? And they did chide with him sharply.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ምንተ ፡ ገበርኩ ፡ ይእዜ ፡ ከመ ፡ ዘአንትሙ ፡ [ኢ]ትኄይ[ስ]ኒ ፡ ቈጽለ ፡ ኤፍሬም ፡ [እም]ቀሥመ ፡
                  አቢየዜር ።

translations.lxx: And he said to them, What have I now done in comparison of you? is not the gleaning of Ephraim better than the vintage of Abiezer?
translations.kjv: And he said unto them, What have I done now in comparison of you? Is not the gleaning of the grapes of Ephraim better than the vintage of Abiezer?

verses.geez:
[አኮኑ ፡] ውስተ ፡ እዴክሙ ፡ አግብኦሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለመላእክተ ፡ ምድያም ፡ ሄሬብ ፡ ወዜብ ፡ ወምንተ ፡ ክህልኩ
                  ፡ ገቢረ ፡ ከማክሙ ፤ ወእምዝ ፡ ኀደግዎ ፡ እንከ ፡ ወአእረፈት ፡ ነፍሶሙ ፡ እምኔሁ ፡ ሶበ ፡ ይቤሎሙ ፡ ዘንተ ፡ ቃለ ።

translations.lxx: The Lord has delivered into your hand the princes of Madiam, Oreb and Zeb; and what could I do in comparison of you? Then was their spirit calmed toward him, when he spoke this word.
translations.kjv: God hath delivered into your hands the princes of Midian, Oreb and Zeeb: and what was I able to do in comparison of you? Then their anger was abated toward him, when he had said that.

verses.geez:
ወመጽአ ፡ ጌድዮን ፡ ኀበ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ ወዐደወ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወክልኤቱ ፡ ምእት ፡ ብእሲ ፡ እለ ፡ ምስሌሁ ፡ ወዐንበዙ ፡
                  ሶበ ፡ ርኅቡ ።

translations.lxx: And Gedeon came to Jordan, and went over, himself and the three hundred with him, hungry, yet pursuing.
translations.kjv: And Gideon came to Jordan, and passed over, he, and the three hundred men that were with him, faint, yet pursuing them.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ለሰብአ ፡ ሶኮት ፡ ሀብዎሙ ፡ እክለ ፡ ለሕዝብ ፡ እለ ፡ ምስሌየ ፡ እስመ ፡ ርኅቡ ፡ ወአንሰ ፡ እተልዎሙ ፡
                  ለዜቤሔ ፡ ወለሴልማና ፡ ነገሥተ ፡ ምድያም ።

translations.lxx: And he said to the men of Socchoth, Give, I pray you, bread to feed this people that follow me; because they are faint, and behold, I am following after Zebee and Salmana, kings of Madiam.
translations.kjv: And he said unto the men of Succoth, Give, I pray you, loaves of bread unto the people that follow me; for they be faint, and I am pursuing after Zebah and Zalmunna, kings of Midian.

verses.geez:
ወይቤልዎ ፡ መላእክተ ፡ ሶኮት ፡ ቦኑ ፡ እዴሆሙ ፡ ለዜቤሔ ፡ ወለሴልማና ፡ ይእዜ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴከ ፡ ከመ ፡ ነሀቦሙ ፡
                  እክለ ፡ ለሰራዊትከ ።

translations.lxx: And the princes of Socchoth said, Are the hands of Zebee and Salmana now in thy hand, that we should give bread to thy host?
translations.kjv: And the princes of Succoth said, Are the hands of Zebah and Zalmunna now in thine hand, that we should give bread unto thine army?

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ጌድዮን ፡ አኮ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ እምከመ ፡ አግብኦሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለዜቤሔ ፡ ወለሴልማና ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴየ ፡
                  እሰቅል ፡ ሥጋክሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዐቀባት ፡ ዘገዳም ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ክልኤ ፡ አርቆሚን ።

translations.lxx: And Gedeon said, Therefore when the Lord gives Zebee and Salmana into my hand, then will I tear your flesh with the thorns of the wilderness, and the Barkenim.
translations.kjv: And Gideon said, Therefore when the LORD hath delivered Zebah and Zalmunna into mine hand, then I will tear your flesh with the thorns of the wilderness and with briers.

verses.geez: ወዐርገ ፡ እምህየ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፋኑሔል ፡ [ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ወይቤልዎ ፡] በከመ ፡ ይቤልዎ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ሶኮት ።

translations.lxx: And he went up thence to Phanuel, and spoke to them likewise: and the men of Phanuel answered him as the men of Socchoth had answered him.
translations.kjv: And he went up thence to Penuel, and spake unto them likewise: and the men of Penuel answered him as the men of Succoth had answered him.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ለሰብአ ፡ ፋኑሔል ፡ ሶበ ፡ ገባእኩ ፡ በዳኅን ፡ እነሥቶ ፡ ለዝንቱ ፡ ማኅፈድ ።

translations.lxx: And Gedeon said to the men of Phanuel, When I return in peace, I will break down this tower.
translations.kjv: And he spake also unto the men of Penuel, saying, When I come again in peace, I will break down this tower.

verses.geez:
ወዜቤሔሰ ፡ ወሴልማና ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቀርቀር ፡ ወትዕይንቶሙ ፡ ምስሌሆሙ ፡ ወየአክሉ ፡ እልፈ ፡ ወኀምሳ ፡ ምእተ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡
                  እለ ፡ ተርፉ ፡ እምነ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ተዓይኒሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ጽባሕ ፡ ወእለሰ ፡ ወድቁ ፡ ዐሠርቱ ፡ እልፍ ፡ ወዕሥራ ፡ ምእት ፡
                  ብእሲ ፡ እለ ፡ ይጸውሩ ፡ ኵናተ ።

translations.lxx: And Zebee and Salmana were in Carcar, and their host was with them, about fifteen thousand, all that were left of all the host of the aliens; and they that fell were a hundred and twenty thousand men that drew the sword.
translations.kjv: Now Zebah and Zalmunna were in Karkor, and their hosts with them, about fifteen thousand men, all that were left of all the hosts of the children of the east: for there fell an hundred and twenty thousand men that drew sword.

verses.geez:
ወዐርገ ፡ ጌድዮን ፡ ፍኖተ ፡ እለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አዕጻዳት ፡ ጽባሓውያን ፡ እለ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ናቤት ፡ ላዕለ ፡
                  ዜቤሔ ፡ ወቀተለ ፡ ትዕይንቶሙ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይትአመኑ ።

translations.lxx: And Gedeon went up by the way of them that dwelt in tents, eastward of Nabai and Jegebal; and he smote the host, and the host was secure.
translations.kjv: And Gideon went up by the way of them that dwelt in tents on the east of Nobah and Jogbehah, and smote the host: for the host was secure.

verses.geez:
ወጐዩ ፡ ዜቤሔ ፡ ወሴልማና ፡ ወዴገኖሙ ፡ ወተለዎሙ ፡ ወአሐዞሙ ፡ ለክልኤሆሙ ፡ ነገሥተ ፡ ምድያም ፡ ለዜቤሔ ፡
                  ወለሴልማና ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ ትዕይንቶሙ ፡ ቀጥቀጦሙ ፡ ጌድዮን ።

translations.lxx: And Zebee and Salmana fled; and he pursued after them, and took the two kings of Madiam, Zebee and Salmana, and discomfited all the army.
translations.kjv: And when Zebah and Zalmunna fled, he pursued after them, and took the two kings of Midian, Zebah and Zalmunna, and discomfited all the host.

verses.geez: ወተመይጠ ፡ ጌድዮን ፡ ወልደ ፡ ዮአስ ፡ እምነ ፡ ፀብእ ፡ እምነ ፡ ዐቀበ ፡ አሬስ ።

translations.lxx: And Gedeon the son of Joas returned from the battle, down from the battle of Ares.
translations.kjv: And Gideon the son of Joash returned from battle before the sun was up,

verses.geez:
ወአኀዙ ፡ አሐደ ፡ ወልደ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ሶኮት ፡ ወሐተቶ ፡ ወአጽሐፎሙ ፡ [ለ]መላእክተ ፡ ሶከት ፡ ወሊቃናቲሃ ፡
                  ሰብዓ ፡ ወሰብዐቱ ፡ ብእሲ ።

translations.lxx: And he took prisoner a young lad of the men of Socchoth, and questioned him; and he wrote to him the names of the princes of Socchoth and of their elders, seventy-seven men.
translations.kjv: And caught a young man of the men of Succoth, and enquired of him: and he described unto him the princes of Succoth, and the elders thereof, even threescore and seventeen men.

verses.geez:
ወበጽሐ ፡ [ኀበ ፡ መላእክተ ፡] ሶኮት ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ነዮሙ ፡ ዜቤሔ ፡ ወሴልማና ፡ በአለ ፡ ቦሙ ፡ ተዐየርክሙ ፡
                  ወትቤሉኒ ፡ ቦኑ ፡ እዴሆሙ ፡ ለዜቤሔ ፡ ወለሴልማና ፡ ይእዜ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴከ ፡ ከመ ፡ ነሀቦሙ ፡ እክለ ፡ ለእለ ፡ ርኅቡ
                  ፡ ሰብእከ ።

translations.lxx: And Gedeon came to the princes of Socchoth, and said, Behold Zebee and Salmana, about whom ye reproached me, saying, Are the hands of Zebee and Salmana now in thy hand, that we should give bread to thy men that are faint?
translations.kjv: And he came unto the men of Succoth, and said, Behold Zebah and Zalmunna, with whom ye did upbraid me, saying, Are the hands of Zebah and Zalmunna now in thine hand, that we should give bread unto thy men that are weary?

verses.geez:
ወነሥኦሙ ፡ ለሰብአ ፡ ሶኮት ፡ ለሊቃናቲሆሙ ፡ ወለመላእክቲሆሙ ፡ ወሰቀሎሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዐቀባተ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ወውስተ ፡
                  በራቄኒም ፡ ወሰቀሎሙ ፡ ምስሌሆሙ ፡ ለሰብአ ፡ ሶኮት ።

translations.lxx: And he took the elders of the city with the thorns of the wilderness and the Barkenim, and with them he tore the men of the city.
translations.kjv: And he took the elders of the city, and thorns of the wilderness and briers, and with them he taught the men of Succoth.

verses.geez: ወነሠቶ ፡ ለማኅፈደ ፡ ፋኑሔል ፡ ወቀተሎሙ ፡ ለሰብአ ፡ ፋኑሔል ፡ ወለሀገሮሙ ።

translations.lxx: And he overthrew the tower of Phanuel, and slew the men of the city.
translations.kjv: And he beat down the tower of Penuel, and slew the men of the city.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ለዜቤሔ ፡ ወለሴልማና ፡ አይቴ ፡ ዕደው ፡ እለ ፡ ቀተልክሙ ፡ በታቦር ፡ ወይቤልዎ ፡ ከማከ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡
                  ወኪያከ ፡ ይመስሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ወከመ ፡ ርእየተ ፡ ገጸ ፡ ደቀ ፡ ነገሥት ።

translations.lxx: And he said to Zebee and Salmana, Where are the men whom ye slew in Thabor? and they said, As thou, so were they, according to the likeness of the son of a king.
translations.kjv: Then said he unto Zebah and Zalmunna, What manner of men were they whom ye slew at Tabor? And they answered, As thou art, so were they; each one resembled the children of a king.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ጌድዮን ፡ አኀዊየ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ወደቂቀ ፡ እምየ ፡ ወመሐለ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ሕያው ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡
                  ሶበ ፡ አሕየውክምዎሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ እምኢቀተልኩክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Gedeon said, They were my brethren and the sons of my mother: as the Lord lives, if ye had preserved them alive, I would not have slain you.
translations.kjv: And he said, They were my brethren, even the sons of my mother: as the LORD liveth, if ye had saved them alive, I would not slay you.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ለዮቶር ፡ በኵሩ ፡ ተንሥእ ፡ ቅትሎሙ ፡ ወኢመልሐ ፡ መጥባሕቶ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ሕፃን ፡ እስመ ፡ ንዑስ ፡ ውእቱ ፡
                  ወፈርሀ ።

translations.lxx: And he said to Jether his first-born, Rise and slay them; but the lad drew not his sword, for he was afraid, for he was yet very young.
translations.kjv: And he said unto Jether his firstborn, Up, and slay them. But the youth drew not his sword: for he feared, because he was yet a youth.

verses.geez:
ወይቤልዎ ፡ ዜቤሔ ፡ ወሴልማና ፡ ተንሥእ ፡ አንተ ፡ ወተራከበነ ፡ እስመ ፡ ከመ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ኀይልከ ፡ ወተንሥአ
                  ፡ ጌድዮን ፡ ወቀተሎሙ ፡ ለዜቤሔ ፡ ወለሴልማና ፡ ወነሥአ ፡ ባዝግናተ ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ ክሳዳተ ፡ አግማላቲሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Zebee and Salmana said, Rise thou and fall upon us, for thy power is as that of a man; and Gedeon arose, and slew Zebee and Salmana; and he took the round ornaments that were on the necks of their camels.
translations.kjv: Then Zebah and Zalmunna said, Rise thou, and fall upon us: for as the man is, so is his strength. And Gideon arose, and slew Zebah and Zalmunna, and took away the ornaments that were on their camels’ necks.

verses.geez:
ወይቤልዎ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ለጌድዮን ፡ ተመልአክ ፡ ለነ ፡ አንተ ፡ ወደቂቅከ ፡ እስመ ፡ አድኀንከነ ፡ እምነ ፡
                  እደ ፡ ምድያም ።

translations.lxx: And the men of Israel said to Gedeon, Rule, my lord, over us, both thou, and thy son, and thy son's son; for thou hast saved us out of the hand of Madiam.
translations.kjv: Then the men of Israel said unto Gideon, Rule thou over us, both thou, and thy son, and thy son’s son also: for thou hast delivered us from the hand of Midian.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ጌድዮን ፡ ኢይመልክ ፡ አንሰ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ወወልድየኒ ፡ ኢይመልክ ፡ ለክሙ ፤ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ይመልክ ፡ ለክሙ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And Gedeon said to them, I will not rule, and my son shall not rule among you; the Lord shall rule over you.
translations.kjv: And Gideon said unto them, I will not rule over you, neither shall my son rule over you: the LORD shall rule over you.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ጌድዮን ፡ እስእል ፡ እምኔክሙ ፡ ስእለተ ፡ ወሀቡኒ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ አዕኑገ ፡ [ዘወርቅ ፡] ዘሰለበ ፡
                  እስመ ፡ ብዙኀ ፡ አዕኑገ ፡ ቦሙ ፡ እስመ ፡ እስማዔላውያን ፡ እሙንቱ ።

translations.lxx: And Gedeon said to them, I will make a request of you, and do ye give me every man an earring out of his spoils: for they had golden earrings, for they were Ismaelites.
translations.kjv: And Gideon said unto them, I would desire a request of you, that ye would give me every man the earrings of his prey. (For they had golden earrings, because they were Ishmaelites.)

verses.geez: ወይቤሉ ፡ ውሂበ ፡ ንሁብ ፡ ወሰፍሐ ፡ ልብሶ ፡ ወገደፉ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ አዕኑገ ፡ ዘሰለቡ ።

translations.lxx: And they said, We will certainly give them: and he opened his garment, and each man cast therein an earring of his spoils.
translations.kjv: And they answered, We will willingly give them. And they spread a garment, and did cast therein every man the earrings of his prey.

verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ ድልወተ ፡ ወርቀ ፡ አዕኑጊሁ ፡ ዘሰአሎሙ ፡ ዐሠርተ ፡ ወትስዐተ ፡ ምእተ ፡ በሰቅል ፡ ወርቁ ፡ እንበለ ፡
                  አውጻባት ፡ ወባዝግናት ፡ ዘኤፎት ፡ ወመዋጥሕ ፡ ዘሜላት ፡ ዘላዕለ ፡ ነገሥተ ፡ ምድያም ፡ ወእንበለ ፡ ሐብላተ ፡ ወርቅ ፡
                  ዘውስተ ፡ ክሳዳተ ፡ አግማላቲሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And the weight of the golden earrings which he asked, was a thousand and seven hundred pieces of gold, besides the crescents, and the chains, and the garments, and the purple cloths that were on the kings of Madiam, and besides the chains that were on the necks of their camels.
translations.kjv: And the weight of the golden earrings that he requested was a thousand and seven hundred shekels of gold; beside ornaments, and collars, and purple raiment that was on the kings of Midian, and beside the chains that were about their camels’ necks.

verses.geez:
ወገብረ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ጌድዮን ፡ ምስለ ፡ ወአቀሞ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሀገሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኤፍሬም ፡ ወዘመዉ ፡ ቦቱ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ እስራኤል
                  ፡ ወተለውዎ ፡ በህየ ፡ ወኮኖ ፡ ጌጋየ ፡ ለጌድዮን ፡ ወለቤቱ ።

translations.lxx: And Gedeon made an ephod of it, and set it in his city in Ephratha; and all Israel went thither a whoring after it, and it became a stumbling-block to Gedeon and his house.
translations.kjv: And Gideon made an ephod thereof, and put it in his city, even in Ophrah: and all Israel went thither a whoring after it: which thing became a snare unto Gideon, and to his house.

verses.geez:
ወተ[ትሕ]ቱ ፡ ምድያም ፡ ቅድሜሆሙ ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ ወኢደገሙ ፡ እንከ ፡ አልዕሎ ፡ ርእሶሙ ፡ ወአእረፈት ፡ ምድር ፡
                  ፵ዓመ ፡ በመዋዕለ ፡ ጌድዮን ።

translations.lxx: And Madiam was straitened before the children of Israel, and they did not lift up their head any more; and the land had rest forty years in the days of Gedeon.
translations.kjv: Thus was Midian subdued before the children of Israel, so that they lifted up their heads no more. And the country was in quietness forty years in the days of Gideon.

verses.geez: ወሖረ ፡ ኢየሮቦዓም ፡ ወልደ ፡ ዮአስ ፡ ወነበረ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቤቱ ።

translations.lxx: And Jerobaal the son of Joas went and sat in his house.
translations.kjv: And Jerubbaal the son of Joash went and dwelt in his own house.

verses.geez: ወቦ ፡ ጌድዮን ፡ ሰብዓ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እለ ፡ የሐውሩ ፡ በገቦሁ ፡ እስመ ፡ ብዙኃት ፡ አንስትያሁ ።

translations.lxx: And Gedeon had seventy sons begotten of his body, for he had many wives.
translations.kjv: And Gideon had threescore and ten sons of his body begotten: for he had many wives.

verses.geez: ወዕቅብቱ ፡ በውስተ ፡ ሲቂምስ ፡ ወለደት ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ወሰመዮ ፡ ስሞ ፡ አቢሜሌክ ።

translations.lxx: And his concubine was in Sychem, and she also bore him a son, and gave him the name Abimelech.
translations.kjv: And his concubine that was in Shechem, she also bare him a son, whose name he called Abimelech.

verses.geez:
ወሞተ ፡ ጌድዮን ፡ ወልደ ፡ ዮአስ ፡ በሀገር ፡ ሠኔት ፡ ወተቀብረ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መቃብረ ፡ አቡሁ ፡ ዮአስ ፡ በኤፍራታ ፡
                  አቢየዝሪ ።

translations.lxx: And Gedeon son of Joas died in his city, and was buried in the sepulchre of Joas his father in Ephratha of Abi-Esdri.
translations.kjv: And Gideon the son of Joash died in a good old age, and was buried in the sepulchre of Joash his father, in Ophrah of the Abiezrites.

verses.geez:
ወእምዝ ፡ ሶበ ፡ ሞተ ፡ ጌድዮን ፡ ወተመይጡ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወተለዉ ፡ በዓልም ፡ ወተካየዱ ፡ ምስሌሁ ፡ ለበዓል
                  ፡ ከመ ፡ ይኩኖሙ ፡ አምላኮሙ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass when Gedeon was dead, that the children of Israel turned, and went a whoring after Baalim, and made for themselves a covenant with Baal that he should be their god.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, as soon as Gideon was dead, that the children of Israel turned again, and went a whoring after Baalim, and made Baalberith their god.

verses.geez:
ወኢተዘከርዎ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላኮሙ ፡ ዘአድኀኖሙ ፡ እምእደ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ፀሮሙ ፡ እለ ፡ ዐውዶሙ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And the children of Israel remembered not the Lord their God who had delivered them out of the hand of all that afflicted them round about.
translations.kjv: And the children of Israel remembered not the LORD their God, who had delivered them out of the hands of all their enemies on every side:

verses.geez:
ወኢገብሩ ፡ ምሕረተ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ኢየሮበዓም ፡ ዘውእቱ ፡ ጌድዮን ፡ በኵሉ ፡ ሠናይት ፡ እንተ ፡ ገብረ ፡ ምስለ ፡
                  እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And they did not deal mercifully with the house of Jerobaal, (the same is Gedeon) according to all the good which he did to Israel.
translations.kjv: Neither shewed they kindness to the house of Jerubbaal, namely, Gideon, according to all the goodness which he had shewed unto Israel.
